# Copilot Instructions for Nexus RPG

> **Superseded.** Project instructions now live in [`/CLAUDE.md`](../../CLAUDE.md) (project overview, commands, conventions, content pipeline) and [`/src/features/CharacterSheet/CLAUDE.md`](../../src/features/CharacterSheet/CLAUDE.md) (character sheet app internals).
>
> Game-content design guidance lives in the skills under [`/.claude/skills/`](../../.claude/skills/):
> - `spell-design` — spells (rank scaling, school identities, validation)
> - `talent-design` — skill talents (rank progression, resource budgets, archetypes)
> - `creature-design` — creatures (tier chassis, Elite/Lord mechanics)
> - `magic-item-design` — magic items (cost formula, materials, enchantments)
> - `game-basics.md` — shared core system + writing standards reference
>
> Design analysis documents (balance audits, gap analyses): [`/docs/analysis/`](../../docs/analysis/).

Read those files instead of this directory.
